subcodes.first_line: O remnant of that exalted leader of the righteous! As I pen these words to that spiritual friend, I am reminded of that Manifestation of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن سرور ابرار چون بان یار روحانی نامه نگارم بیاد آن مظهر رحمانی افتم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
